name: pun-so-tshia
description: 高雄垃圾車即時系統 Monorepo（Vue 3 + FastAPI）

scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c blue,green "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.dev:backend: cross-env PYTHONPATH=backend python -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --reload-dir backend --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000
